# PANELVERSE
> Creative Technology Studio — High-converting landing pages, AI-powered ad creatives, n8n automation systems, email marketing, and modern web development.

## Sections

### Hero
- **Tagline**: We Build Landing Pages, AI Creatives & Automation Systems That Generate Leads
- **Subtitle**: Panelverse helps businesses grow through high-converting landing pages, modern websites, AI-powered ad creatives, email marketing systems, and smart workflow automations.
- **Trust checkpoints**: Fast Delivery, Mobile Optimized, Conversion-Focused Systems, Built for Growth
- **CTA**: Get Free Proposal (scrolls to #contact), View Services (scrolls to #services)

### Trust Metrics
- 25+ Projects Delivered
- 1000+ Hours Automated
- Fast Turnaround Time
- Premium Digital Solutions

### Services (6 offerings)
1. **Landing Pages for Paid Ads** — High-converting pages for Google Ads, Meta Ads, funnel flows. Mobile-first, persuasive copy, real-time analytics.
2. **Website Development** — Custom-coded sites for corporate, e-commerce, SaaS. SEO-optimized, modern CMS, fully responsive.
3. **n8n Automation Systems** — Workflow automation for lead syncing, CRM pipelines, notifications, multi-app integrations, WhatsApp alerts.
4. **Email Marketing Systems** — Newsletters, nurture flows, sales launches. Multi-segment funnel, high deliverability, pro layouts.
5. **AI Visual Production** — AI-generated ad graphics for Meta, LinkedIn, web. Multi-format scalability, professional design.
6. **AI Video & Music Production** — Cinematic reels, promos, custom voiceover. Kinetic captions, AI voice gen, rhythmic edits.

### Built for (niches)
Startups, Local Businesses, Coaches & Consultants, Marketing Agencies, E-commerce Brands, Personal Brands, SaaS Businesses, Real Estate, Content Creators

### Why Panelverse
- Conversion-Focused Approach
- AI-Driven Creativity & Automated Logic
- Data-Driven Decisions & Performance

### What Clients Choose Us For
- Premium Modern Design
- Fast Delivery
- Conversion-Focused
- Smart Automation

### Testimonials (4 featured)
1. Rohan Mehta — Founder, FitFuel: leads ↑210% in 30 days
2. Anjali Sharma — CMO, EduScale: professional, fast, creative
3. Karan Virk — CEO, BuildRight: n8n saved 20+ hrs/week
4. Neha Kapoor — Growth Marketer: ROAS improved significantly

### Process (4 steps)
1. Strategy — research, plan, roadmap
2. Design — premium UI/UX, layouts, flowcharts
3. Development — code, databases, CRM, stress-tested
4. Launch & Scale — deployment, handover, operations

## Technical Details
- **Stack**: Vanilla HTML + Tailwind CSS (CDN) + Lucide Icons
- **Fonts**: Plus Jakarta Sans (body), Cinzel (headings)
- **Colors**: Brand bg #050507, Gold accent #d4af37, Neon Red #f95738
- **Analytics**: Google Search Console verification file present
- **Animations**: Custom scroll-based reveal via IntersectionObserver (`[data-aos]` attributes: fade-up, fade-down, fade-left, fade-right, scale-up, fade-in)
- **Hosting**: Static site, single-page application with hash-based navigation
- **Form handler**: Google Apps Script web app
- **Backgrounds**: Cloudinary-hosted video (hero) and images (services, testimonials, contact sections)
- **Responsive breakpoints**: Tailwind defaults (sm 640px, md 768px, lg 1024px)

## Files
- `index.html` — Main landing page (all content in one file including CSS and JS)
- `sitemap.xml` — XML sitemap for search engines
- `sitemap.html` — Visual sitemap page
- `robots.txt` — Crawler instructions
- `siteimage.png` — Site preview image
- `googlef2024d0ddf99fba6.html` — Google Search Console verification
- `.vscode/settings.json` — Editor configuration
